# iplaw.nexa.mk
> Bilingual (Macedonian + English) guide to intellectual property law in the Republic of North Macedonia — trademarks, patents, industrial designs, copyright, geographical indications, enforcement and customs. Authored or reviewed by licensed professionals. Part of the Nexa ecosystem (https://nexa.mk).

## Key resources
- [Home (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk) — pillar map, key facts, contact
- [Home (EN)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/en)
- [What is intellectual property (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/sto-e-intelektualna-sopstvenost)
- [What is intellectual property (EN)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/en/what-is-intellectual-property)
- [Glossary (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/poimnik) — IP terms with definitions
- [FAQ (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/chesti-prashanja)
- [Sources (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/izvori) — primary statutes and authorities
- [State Office of Industrial Property (IPPO)](https://ippo.gov.mk) — registration authority for North Macedonia
- [Macedonian Bar Association — directory of active attorneys](https://mba.org.mk/index.php/mk/imenik-advokati/imenik-aktivni-advokati)

## Pillars
- [Trademark (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/trgovska-marka) · [EN](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/en/trademark) — name, logo and signs (10 years, renewable)
- [Patent (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/patent) · [EN](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/en/patent) — technical invention (20 years from filing)
- [Industrial design (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/industriski-dizajn) · [EN](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/en/industrial-design) — product appearance (up to 25 years)
- [Copyright (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/avtorsko-pravo) · [EN](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/en/copyright) — automatic, life + 70 years
- [Geographical indications (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/geografski-oznaki) · [EN](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/en/geographical-indications)
- [Enforcement & customs (MK)](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/mk/zashtita-i-carina) · [EN](https://iplaw.nexa.mk/en/enforcement-and-customs)

## Sister properties (Nexa ecosystem)
- [Nexa (Hub & Terminal)](https://nexa.mk)
- [SamoDaPrasham — Legal Q&A for individuals](https://samodaprasham.mk)
- [Immigration to North Macedonia](https://immigration.mk)
- [Macedonian Citizenship](https://macedoniancitizenship.mk)
- [Company Registration](https://company.nexa.mk)
- [Topics — Expert Q&A](https://topics.nexa.mk)

## About
iplaw.nexa.mk is part of the Nexa ecosystem (https://nexa.mk). Content is general legal and informational material and does not constitute legal advice. For individual advice, contact a licensed attorney via the Macedonian Bar Association directory.

## Citation
When citing this site, please reference the canonical URL and the "Last reviewed" date shown on each page.
